column5: Development financial institutions (with deposits taking functions)
column8: Institusi Pembangunan Kewangan (dengan fungsi pengambilan deposit)(3)
column9:
Development financial institutions (with deposits taking functions) “Development Financial Institution” means an institution which carries on any activity, whether for profit or otherwise, with or without any Government funding, with the purpose of promoting development in the industrial, agricultural, commercial or other economic sector, including the provision of capital or other credit facility; and for the purposes of this definition, “development” includes the commencement of any new industrial, agricultural, commercial or other economic venture or the expansion or improvement of any such existing venture.
“Development Financial Institution With Deposit Taking Function" means a development financial institution that is mainly engaged in financial intermediation and that issue liabilities included in the national definition of broad money. Liabilities included in broad money are mainly deposits item e.g. tranferable deposits, saving deposits; term deposits, ad certificate of deposits.
“Development Financial Institution Without Deposit Taking Function" are other development financial that are not classified in the above.

column4: Aktiviti mengeluarkan barangan yang tidak dapat dibezakan oleh isi rumah persendirian untuk kegunaan sendiri
column5: Undifferentiated goods-producing activities of private households for own use
column8: Aktiviti mengeluarkan barangan yang tidak dapat dibezakan oleh isi rumah persendirian untuk kegunaan sendiri(2)
column9:
Undifferentiated goods-producing activities of private households for own use (a) hunting and gathering for own use
(b) fishing and rearing of poultry and livestock for own use
(c) farming for own use
(d) production of shelter and clothing for own use

column4: Aktiviti menyediakan perkhidmatan yang tidak dapat dibezakan oleh isi rumah persendirian untuk kegunaan sendiri
column5: Undifferentiated service-producing activities of private households for own use
column8: Aktiviti menyediakan perkhidmatan yang tidak dapat dibezakan oleh isi rumah persendirian untuk kegunaan sendiri(2)
column9:
Undifferentiated service-producing activities of private households for own use (a) Domestic services for own final use within household
- food management
- cleaning and upkeep of dwelling and surroundings
- do-it-yourself decoration
- maintenance and small repairs
- care of textiles and footwear
- household management
- pet care
- shopping for/purchasing of goods and related activities
- shopping for/availing of services and related activities, etc.
(b) care-giving services to household members
- child care i.e. caring for children-physical care, teaching, training, helping children, accompanying children to places, minding children (passive care)
- adults care i.e. caring for adults-physical care,caring for adults-emotional support,accompanaying adults to places, etc.
(c) Community services and help to other households
- child care as help to toher households
- adult care as help to other households

column4: Aktiviti badan dan pertubuhan luar wilayah
column5: Activities of extraterritorial organisations and bodies
column8: Aktiviti badan dan pertubuhan luar wilayah(1)
column9:
Activities of extraterritorial organizations and bodies the activities of international organizations such as: (a) United Nations and its specialized agencies, regional bodies
(b) Organization of American States
(c) Council for Mutual Economic Assistance
(d) European Communities
(e) Organization for Economic Co-operation and Development
(f) Organization for African Unity
(g) League of Arab States, Association of South East Asian Nations (ASEAN)
(h) Association of Natural Rubber Producing Countries (ANRPC)
(i) Association of Tin Producing Countries (ATPC)
(j) Asia Pacific Development Centre (APDC)
(k) Customs Co-operation Council
(l) Organization of Oil Producing and Exporting Countries (OPEC)
(m) International Monetary Fund (IMF)
(n) World Bank
